title: fees::select_notes InsufficientFunds 'have' uses plain .sum() — panics on overflow in debug
description: wallet/src/fees.rs select_notes line 156: 'let have = available.iter().map(|n| n.value_zatoshi).sum::<u64>()' uses plain .sum() which panics on overflow in debug builds. The selection loop above uses checked_add consistently; this inconsistency means a corrupt DB with note values summing > u64::MAX causes a panic only when reporting the error, not earlier. Compare tx_builder.rs select_notes_spendable which correctly uses saturating_add for the equivalent 'have' accumulation. Fix: replace plain .sum() with fold+saturating_add or checked fold.
